title: Switch repo task tracking to Taskulus
description: Remove Beads task-management guidance, enable Taskulus beads compatibility mode for this repo, and update docs to reflect Taskulus self-hosting.
creator: Ryan Alyn Porter

custom.beads_notes:
Plan: update AGENTS.md, remove beads skill files, set beads_compatibility true in config, update README references, run smoke checks.
Progress: removed Beads agent policy pointers, deleted .agent-skills, set beads_compatibility=true in .taskulus.yml and project/config.yaml, updated README/python/README to reference Taskulus. Smoke checks via PYTHONPATH=python/src python3 -m taskulus.cli list/ready/show failed with InvalidHierarchyError (story cannot have child event). Filed follow-up Taskulus issue tskl-ezt.
Completed: removed Beads agent policy, set beads_compatibility true in repo configs, updated README/python README, filed compatibility bug issue (tskl-ezt).
